name: cuba-memorys
description: Persistent memory for AI agents — knowledge graph MCP server with 23 tools: sqlx-migrate, BM25 hybrid + MMR + OOD abstention + tiktoken budget, conformal prediction, testing-effect decay (Karpicke-Roediger 2008), Hebbian Δt-aware, Robbins-Monro Oja, source credibility tracking. Plus v0.8 features (project scoping, compaction snapshots, git-friendly sync, LLM-judge), Hebbian learning, RRF fusion, episodic memory, prospective triggers, Bayesian calibration, link prediction. PostgreSQL + pgvector, sub-millisecond.
author: Leandro Pérez G.
